metadata.description: vnc-remote-control delivered as a single Claude Code plugin: a skill to drive any VNC/RFB server (screenshot, OCR, click, type, keys) with the vnc-remote-control CLI.

plugins.name: vnc-remote-control
plugins.description: Observe and control a machine over VNC/RFB with the vnc-remote-control CLI: screenshot, read the screen (OCR), click a pixel or labeled element, type text and press keys.
